questions.question: Which practice most improves Java maintainability?
options: Clear types and small focused classes

questions.question: What is the benefit of programming to an interface?
options: It allows implementations to be replaced more easily

questions.question: Why catch specific exceptions?
options: To preserve intent and handle known failures clearly

questions.question: What is a professional Java deliverable?
options: Code plus tests, documentation and operational evidence

questions.question: Why use dependency injection?
options: To separate construction from behaviour and improve testability
